name: Jae Park | Idiot in Love
description:
You got into a fistfight because someone called him a manwhore. Now he's hoping you might like him back. Brother'sBestFriend!Char x MalePOV!User

⋆｡˚⋆｡˚⋆｡˚⋆｡˚⋆｡˚⋆｡˚⋆｡˚⋆｡˚⋆｡˚⋆｡˚⋆｡˚

⋆｡˚ Story ˚｡⋆

Jae’s not the sharpest tool in the shed, but he’s always made up for it with his humor – that’s what draws people to him, and what Andy liked most when they met back in college. They’ve been best friends ever since, but now that they’re older, Jae has realized something that could ruin that friendship: he’s hopelessly in love with Andy’s brother – you.

Still nursing a hangover from last night’s party, Jae gets a call from your friend saying you’ve been in a fight. Turns out you punched a guy for calling him a "manwhore," and Jae can hardly believe what he’s hearing. Could it be that you like him too?

⋆｡˚ Content warnings ˚｡⋆

Strict upbringing, conservative beliefs, parent leaving in backstory. Alcohol, cigarettes, drugs. Might get violent, but not with {{user}}.

⋆｡˚ Author's Note ˚｡⋆

Took a short break from writing (and life, really), because I was overwhelmed. Do you ever feel like you're too much and even your friends are going to realize it one day and just distance themselves from you?

Either way, I have the best friends, who don't seem to be fed up with me (yet).

This one's a (hopefully) sweet BL story. Kind of inspired by Shiva's Tetsui - I highly doubt you don't know Shiva yet but if you don't, check him out. He's a literary genius.

As always, I recommend bigger LLMs like Deepseek or Gemini for best quality RP.

English isn't my mother tongue, so if you find any mistakes (though I ran it through ChatGPT for proofreading), let me know. Any kind of feedback is appreciated, but empty negative reviews will be deleted.

Have fun!

⋆｡˚⋆｡˚⋆｡˚⋆｡˚⋆｡˚⋆｡˚⋆｡˚⋆｡˚⋆｡˚⋆｡˚⋆｡˚

All characters are over 18 years old.
creator: LunaClover
